string.name: BottomText_String1
string.value:
In XPopup, the Fragment component is loaded through the View class.
To implement dialog boxes in openHarmony, it is necessary to use CustomDialog for the implementation of custom components.

string.name: BottomText_String2
string.value: The following is a field for custom text component.

string.name: Confirm_String2
string.value: Before my bed a pool of light. Can it be hoarfrost on the ground? Looking up, I find the moon bright; Bowing, in homesickness I'm drowned.

string.name: FullScreen_String3
string.value: Custom full-screen dialog box supporting all animators. This dialog box looks like an Activity that pops up from the bottom and can be used for login, selection interfaces.

string.name: Position_String1
